name: soft-decoration-boq-generator
description: 软装清单自动生成工具的设计师后台界面原型

scripts.check:
npm test && python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
for file in ['index.html', 'src/styles.css', 'src/app.js']:
    text = Path(file).read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    assert text.strip(), f'{file} is empty'
html = Path('index.html').read_text(encoding='utf-8')
assert './src/app.js' in html, 'index.html must load ./src/app.js for GitHub Pages'
print('static interface files are present and readable')
PY
